title: Harris Essentials Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush 3 Pack, 1in, 1.5in, 2in
features: 5-pack of high-quality woodwork gloss paint brushes - perfect for smaller interior woodwork areas.
Provides better paint pick-up and a superior finish compared to the Harris Essentials brush range.
Ideal for painting flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, and doors.
Includes a range of brush sizes (0.5", 1", 1.5", and 2 x 2") for versatility in different areas and projects.
Achieve smooth application and excellent coverage for a flawless finish every time.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier. Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss 3 Paint Brush Pack Contents 1 x 1 inch 1 x 1.5 inch 2 x 2 inch For painting smaller interior woodwork areas A step up from our Essentials Woodwork Gloss brushes, this pack contains all the brushes you need to paint smaller areas of interior woodwork with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. These brushes give a better paint pick up and a better finish compared to our Harris Essentials brush range. Ideal for painting flat sections of wooden trim such as skirting boards, stair banisters and doors. Doing a Painting Project Don't forget to team your Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss paint brushes with the 4" Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Roller Set!
